name: Dead Man's Hand
flavor: Aces and eights, face up on the table. Everyone at the game knows what that hand means, and so, now, do you.
description: You lay down a hand that should not exist and let its meaning hit like a verdict. Choose one creature you can see within range; it must succeed on a Constitution saving throw against your {{trick save DC|8 + proficiency bonus + your trick ability modifier}} or be stunned until the end of your next turn. On a success, it instead has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks until the end of your next turn.
sheetSummary: Once per combat. Action, 30 ft. Costs 4 Mayhem. Con save vs trick DC. Fail: stunned until end of your next turn. Success: disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks until end of your next turn.
